problem: What limits adult neuroplasticity — can those limits be safely removed?
hypothesis: If Ketamine-like NMDA antagonism without dissociation is applied to be, then function improves will occur because prior evidence supports this pathway.

experiment.protocol: Optogenetic mouse model with 5 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: We cannot solve problems with the same thinking that created them. — Einstein paraphrase
